title: Mountain Cave Revealed as Ancient Copper Mining Camp
description: High in Spain's Pyrenees, a cave packed with green stones is rewriting what archaeologists thought they knew about prehistoric life in the mountains. title: Scientists Unearthed a 100-Foot Dinosaur Fossil So Heavy It Cracked the Road Beneath During Transport
description: A dinosaur so massive, it left a mark on the road itself. But this colossal creature has a lot more to reveal than just its size.

title: McDonald’s reveals exact date it will open new 3,767 sq ft restaurant in ancient English town for first time
